headline.en: Inventory and pricing management for small producers
headline.pt: Gestao de estoque e precificacao para pequenos produtores

cardDescription.en: A SwiftUI app for products, ingredients, stock, pricing and sales in one streamlined workflow.
cardDescription.pt: Um app em SwiftUI para produtos, ingredientes, estoque, precificacao e vendas em um fluxo unico.

en: Alecrim is a financial and inventory management app designed for small food and craft producers.
The product combines stock visibility, pricing support and sales tracking in a cleaner mobile experience than ad hoc spreadsheets.
The design direction prioritizes clarity, confidence and practical decision-making for small businesses.
pt: Alecrim e um app de gestao financeira e de estoque para pequenos produtores.
O produto combina visibilidade de estoque, apoio a precificacao e acompanhamento de vendas em uma experiencia mobile mais clara.

en: Small producers often manage stock, ingredient costs and sales using scattered notes or spreadsheets with low visibility.
pt: Pequenos produtores muitas vezes gerenciam estoque, custos e vendas com anotacoes dispersas.

en: The app centralizes product registration, ingredient control, pricing and sales history in one mobile interface with room to scale.
pt: O app centraliza cadastro de produtos, controle de ingredientes, precificacao e historico de vendas em uma unica interface mobile.

en: SwiftUI interface shaped for accessibility and clarity
Product, ingredient and category management
Sales and stock tracking
Architecture planned for SwiftData and CloudKit sync
pt: Interface em SwiftUI com foco em acessibilidade
Gestao de produtos, ingredientes e categorias

en: The current phase focuses on product structure, domain modeling and interface flows that keep operations simple for non-technical users.
pt: A fase atual foca em estrutura de produto, modelagem e fluxos de interface.

en: Balancing financial concepts and inventory actions in one app requires strong information hierarchy and careful naming.
pt: Equilibrar conceitos financeiros e de estoque no mesmo app exige boa hierarquia de informacao.

en: iOS Developer
Product Designer
pt: Desenvolvedor iOS
Product Designer

headline.en: A student mobility assistant for navigating schedules, routes and campus routines
headline.pt: Um assistente de mobilidade estudantil para horarios, rotas e rotina no campus

cardDescription.en: A cross-functional academic project connecting UX research, mobile prototyping and data organization.
cardDescription.pt: Um projeto academico conectando pesquisa, prototipagem mobile e organizacao de dados.

en: Campus Flow was created to reduce friction in the daily routines of university students moving across classes and activities.
The concept explored route guidance, schedule awareness and contextual information inside a single mobile experience.
pt: Campus Flow foi criado para reduzir friccao na rotina de estudantes entre aulas e atividades.

en: Students frequently juggle building locations, schedule changes and transit gaps without a single source of context.
pt: Estudantes lidam com locais, mudancas de horario e deslocamento sem uma fonte unica de contexto.

en: The product concept unified schedule references, route awareness and contextual reminders into a compact app flow.
pt: O conceito unificou referencias de horario, rotas e lembretes contextuais em um fluxo compacto.

en: User research synthesis
Interface flows in Figma
Information architecture for academic routines
pt: Sintese de pesquisa com usuarios
Fluxos de interface no Figma

en: The biggest challenge was defining which information mattered at each moment without overwhelming the student.
pt: O principal desafio foi definir qual informacao importar em cada momento sem sobrecarregar o estudante.

en: Product Designer
Researcher
pt: Product Designer
Pesquisador

headline.en: A compact dashboard for tracking experiments, tasks and product signals
headline.pt: Um dashboard compacto para acompanhar experimentos, tarefas e sinais de produto

cardDescription.en: A lightweight interface experiment for blending metrics, workflow and decision visibility.
cardDescription.pt: Um experimento de interface para combinar metricas, fluxo de trabalho e visibilidade.

en: Pulseboard is a lightweight dashboard concept for keeping product work visible without turning the interface into a cluttered analytics wall.
It explores concise modules, visual rhythm and a sharper balance between metrics and action.
pt: Pulseboard e um conceito de dashboard leve para manter o trabalho de produto visivel sem poluicao.

en: Dashboard information hierarchy
Design system exploration
Fast iteration in HTML, CSS and JavaScript
pt: Hierarquia de informacao para dashboard
Iteracao rapida em HTML, CSS e JavaScript

en: Frontend Developer
Product Designer
pt: Desenvolvedor Frontend
Product Designer

headline.en: An academic experiment around lightweight note classification and content tagging
headline.pt: Um experimento academico sobre classificacao leve de notas e rotulagem

cardDescription.en: A technical study mixing Python, data pipelines and ML prototyping for academic investigation.
cardDescription.pt: Um estudo tecnico com Python, pipelines de dados e prototipagem de ML.

en: Vision Notes explores simple classification workflows for organizing textual notes and study material.
The project was useful for understanding dataset preparation, annotation tradeoffs and evaluation basics.
pt: Vision Notes explora fluxos simples de classificacao para organizar anotacoes e material de estudo.

en: Python-based experimentation
Dataset structuring and cleaning
Evaluation of simple classification approaches
pt: Experimentacao com Python
Estruturacao e limpeza de datasets

en: Researcher
Developer
pt: Pesquisador
Desenvolvedor
